app.title: 🪿 GOLDEN GOOSE
app.subtitle: own the goose, not the eggs™
app.quit: 🔌 The flock powers down. Your net asset value is safe (unlike your market cap). See you soon!

status.max_level: max level — the flock is legendary

tapper.offline_fmt: 💤 While you touched grass, the flock quietly out-earned your day job by %s tokens.

activity.idle: … the flock waddles about, disrupting nothing in particular. Anything could happen.

viz.empty: silence… even the narrative needs a moment to buffer.

market.price_demand: ↑ in demand (do NOT ask about ROI)

trade.nothing_to_schedule: Nothing to schedule — pick a non-zero amount.
trade.queue_quiet: quiet — no consumers and no orders yet
trade.spec_locked_fmt: 🔒 Derivatives Desk — reach Level %d to discover financial engineering

spec.desk_title: 📉 DERIVATIVES DESK  ·  bet on the bet
spec.call_thesis: eggs go up and to the right, forever
spec.put_thesis: someone will eventually ask about revenue
spec.wipe_warn_fmt: margin call if spot moves %s against you
spec.cant_afford: Not enough tokens to post that premium.
spec.margin_call_fmt: A twitchy prop desk marks your book to market and pulls the plug. Leverage giveth; the margin clerk taketh %s of it back.
spec.mix_panel: BOOK COMPOSITION  ·  where the money sits
spec.mix_empty: no capital deployed — you're all cash and vibes

agents.desk_title: AGENT DESK  ·  hand the geese your card and go touch grass
agents.subtitle: autonomous AI agents trade your book on every slow beat — what could possibly go wrong
agents.panel: AGENT ROSTER  ·  enable one, then don't watch
agents.empty: no agents on payroll — you're still doing this by hand like a chump
agents.fired_fmt: 🤖 %s just moved your money. It says trust the process.

momentum.name: MomentumGPT
momentum.blurb: Buys whatever's already going up. Has never read a balance sheet. Bills you a subscription for the privilege.

dipbuyer.name: BuyTheDip.ai
dipbuyer.blurb: Sees a lower price and calls it 'accumulating.' It's your card, so technically you're accumulating.

profittaker.name: ExitLiquidity LLM
profittaker.blurb: Sells into strength so you don't have to feel joy. Takes a 2-and-20 cut of feelings.

degencall.name: LeverageBro 9000
degencall.blurb: Straps a rocket to the hype and lights it with your credit card. Refers to margin calls as 'learning experiences.'

degenput.name: DoomerAgent
degenput.blurb: Convinced someone will finally ask about revenue. Shorts the bubble with money that isn't its own. Guess whose.
